steps: File AU-NO tax treaty reclaim with Citigroup Australia for BHP Group Ltd dividend, claiming 15% rate instead of 25% applied
Submit Norwegian Tax Administration certificate of residence and treaty eligibility documentation to support 15% withholding rate
Reference Australia-Norway Double Tax Agreement Article 10 (Dividends) for the reduced 15% rate on portfolio investments
Request refund of AUD 138,750.00 excess withholding tax from Australian Taxation Office if custodian cannot process directly
